title: CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS - 211info
text: FRIENDLY HOUSE CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides after-school enrichment program with activities such as art, science, homework help, sports, field trips, and playtime. Children have the opportunity to participate in weekly clubs like photography, theater, gardening, and art. Day camps are available during school breaks. 1737 NW 26th Avenue Portland, OR 97210 Eligibility: After-school program: K-5 grade students of Chapman Elementary Summer Camp: 1-6 grade students Winter Camp: K-5 grade students Spring Break Camp: K-5 grade students Hours: After-school program: Monday-Friday 7am-7:50am and 2:30pm-6pm Summer Camp: 9am-4pm; optional before care (7am-9am) and aftercare (4pm-6pm) Winter Camp: 7:30am-6pm Spring Break Camp: 7:30am-6pm Email (503) 228-4391 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 228-4391 Main phone Main phone (503) 228-4391 Dan Hupala Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Scholarship applications and after-school and camp registrations are available online. FEES: Varies by camp. Sliding scale fee and scholarship opportunities are available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 7am-7pm, Friday 7am-8pm, Saturday 8:30am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Trimet bus line 15, 26, and 77 Services: Camps Children's Play Groups School Readiness Programs Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - FRIENDLY HOUSE COMMUNITY CENTER INFORMATION SERVICES - SENIOR SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FRIENDLY HOUSE
